headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 18, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a 12-4 victory, with the Baltimore Orioles taking down the Cleveland Guardians 6-4. The Atlanta Braves secured a 9-0 win over the Philadelphia Phillies, while the San Francisco Giants defeated the Washington Nationals 10-5. The Seattle Mariners placed first baseman Patrick Wisdom on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain.

Several players have been affected by injuries, including Patrick Wisdom (Seattle Mariners), Zach McKinstry (Detroit Tigers), Josh Hader (Houston Astros), Daniel Palencia (Chicago Cubs), Ken Waldichuk (Washington Nationals), Chris Martin (Texas Rangers), Luis Curvelo (Texas Rangers), and Cody Bradford (Texas Rangers). The Orioles have acquired right-handed pitcher Axel Perez in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers, sending right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott to the Dodgers in return.

The Washington Nationals acquired left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady from the New York Mets for cash, while the Milwaukee Brewers acquired right-handed pitcher Junior Fernández from the Arizona Diamondbacks. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired right-handed pitcher Griff McGarry from the Philadelphia Phillies for future considerations and international bonus pool money. The Baltimore Orioles also acquired first baseman Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds for cash.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Mets 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a lopsided 12-4 victory, securing their win. Moisés Ballesteros led the Mets' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Guardians 6-4**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. Rico Garcia earned the win for the Orioles.

top_news.title: **Braves Blast Phillies 9-0**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Philadelphia Phillies, securing a 9-0 victory. Austin Riley led the Braves' offense with two home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Nationals 10-5**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 10-5 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Logan Webb earning the win. Heliot Ramos led the Giants' offense with a home run, four RBIs, and a walk that scored a crucial run.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Patrick Wisdom on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners first baseman Patrick Wisdom has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Axel Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired right-handed pitcher Axel Perez in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Perez joins the Orioles in exchange for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott.
